pricing: KTA/USD price from DIA Oracle V2 push feed, scaled to 18 decimals with implicit USDC=USD peg (no separate USD/USDC conversion).
notes: ProxyOracle delegates to a custom DIAOracle adapter wrapping DIA Oracle V2. Centralized push model — a single updater (0xB14F5026...) posts prices every ~2 min; data was fresh at check (within minutes). Delegate address is mutable by the owner, introducing upgrade risk. Hardcoded USDC/USD 1:1 peg means any USDC depeg causes collateral mispricing. KTA is a low-cap token with thin on-chain liquidity.
